CONTENT.Career: Born in Kamianets-Podilskyi, Vanat is a product of the DYuSSh-2 Kamianets-Podilskyi and FC Dynamo Kyiv academy systems.He made his debut in the Ukrainian Premier League for Dynamo on 9 May 2021 against Kolos Kovalivka.In July 2021, he moved on loan to Chornomorets Odesa for the 2021 season.On 25 July, he made his league debut against Desna Chernihiv at the Chernihiv Stadium. The season was interrupted due to the full-scale invasion of Russia in Ukraine.
CONTENT.Honours: Dynamo KyivUkrainian Premier League: 2020–21Ukrainian Cup: 2020–21IndividualUkrainian Premier League Player of the Month: December 2023/February 2024, March 2024Ukrainian Premier League top goalscorers: 2023–24

CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 26 May 2024As of match played 17 October 2023As of match played 17 October 2023. Scores and results list Ukraine's goal tally first, score column indicates score after each Vanat goal.

SUMMARY: Vladyslav Andriyovych Vanat (Ukrainian: Владислав Андрійович Ванат; born 4 January 2002) is a Ukrainian professional footballer who plays as a striker for Ukrainian Premier League club Dynamo Kyiv and the Ukraine national team.
